label: Umbral Refraction Grotto
description: Umbral Refraction Grotto is a cavern cut through Kharion Prismworld’s vitreous crust, where the walls present planar facets that meet in strict lattice-aligned angles. Veins of dark crystal form rectilinear grids across the floor and ceiling, interrupting the glass with matte bands that swallow the meridian glare. Light entering through hairline fractures splits into fixed spectral sheets that hang in stable planes, rendering depth and distance as measured strata rather than a continuous void. The air remains cold and dry, and the stone carries a persistent, muted resonance that follows the geometry of the surrounding prism-shell.
